changes: Holy Sheltron: The barrier effect duration has been reduced from 5 seconds to 4 seconds.
Holy Sheltron: The barrier potency has been reduced from 12,000 to 8,000.
Holy Sheltron: The unaspected damage dealt to nearby enemies when the effect expires has been increased from 100% of the remaining barrier potency to 150%.
Holy Sheltron: The Knight's Resolve effect duration has been reduced from 10 seconds to 8 seconds.
Confiteor: Damage potency has been increased from 8,000 to 12,000.
Blade of Faith: Damage potency has been increased from 6,000 to 7,000.
Blade of Truth: Damage potency has been increased from 7,000 to 8,000.
Blade of Valor: Damage potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Honing Ovation: Attack and barrier potency granted by each stack of Acclaim has been decreased from 2,000/3,000/4,000/5,000/6,000 to 1,000/2,000/3,000/4,000/5,000.

new_content.name: The Abyssal Fracture (Extreme)
new_content.description: Moved from Raid Finder to Duty Finder; drop rate for Lynx of Abyssal Grief Flute increased.

new_content.name: Anabaseios: The Twelfth Circle
new_content.description: Weekly restriction on receiving Unsung Blades of Anabaseios removed.

new_content.name: Pandæmonium: Anabaseios (Savage)
new_content.description: Echo effect strengthened (15% increase to max HP, damage dealt, and healing potency).

new_content.name: Thaleia
new_content.description: Weekly limit on treasure coffer rewards and Thaleia coins removed.

new_content.name: Alexander - The Burden of the Son (Savage)
new_content.description: Fixed an issue regarding the enemy action 'Height Error' damage scaling and targeting.

new_content.name: The Satrap of Radz-at-Han
new_content.description: Main scenario quest; fixed an issue where Estinien would not appear in the Baldesion Annex.

new_content.name: Breaking Brick Mountains
new_content.description: Seasonal quest; fixed an issue where players could not repurchase Thug's Mug.

new_content.name: Crystalline Conflict
new_content.description: Season Ten ends and Season Eleven begins; includes rank adjustments and seasonal rewards.
new_content.npc_location: Seasonal Quartermaster (Wolves' Den Pier X:4.9 Y:5.7)

new_content.name: Wondrous Tails
new_content.description: System reward adjustment; Allagan tomestones of causality increased for two rows.

new_content.name: Data Center Travel
new_content.description: All Worlds on the Oceanian data center are now available destinations.

housing.name: Thug's Mug
housing.description: An item that players were unable to repurchase from the recompense officer after completing the seasonal quest 'Breaking Brick Mountains'.

glamour.name: Thug's Mug
glamour.description: An item mentioned as being available for repurchase from the recompense officer after completing the seasonal quest "Breaking Brick Mountains."
